benefits.description: Getting smaller despite scale not always moving; notes weeks or months of no scale change but continued body composition improvement

side_effects.description: Muscle loss experienced; now works out every day to rebuild lost muscle

protocol_notes: Has been on semaglutide for 16 months; recommends tracking with body scans and smart scale; advises high protein intake to prevent muscle loss; uses MeThreeSixty app for body scans
